title: High-Fidelity RAG Pipelines
description: Architect high-fidelity RAG pipelines by integrating Hybrid Search, Query Expansion, and Re-ranking. Implement strategies using Cross-Encoders to solve the 'Lost in the Middle' retrieval problem in RAG systems.
objectives: Architect high-fidelity RAG pipelines by integrating Hybrid Search, Query Expansion, and Re-ranking.
Implement strategies using Cross-Encoders to solve the 'Lost in the Middle' retrieval problem in RAG systems.
